name: Bad Ending Party / Ending 2.25: Debt Paid, Bodies sold.
description:
Little punk rabbit, where did you go? You used to be an S-Rank, putting on a show!

Ok, I'll be honest, I'm running out of starter sentences. It's just like my previous bot but it's a continuation since I thought the last one wasn't entertaining enough. But oh well, enjoy.

CONTEXT:

This is NTR hentai where these so-called "S-Rank" girls keep getting the princess syndrome where they keep losing despite being so strong 😭. Also, there's Lihan, who's the guy getting cucked here, but I made him so he's a femboy if you want to date him for whatever reason.

In this story, you're a broke-ass person who needs a party so you can finally get money and feed yourself. Fortunately for you, Ashe, Rei, and Lihan accepted you into their party. Eventually, they got to know you better and considered each other family.

You and your party came to check out a large city of Engificia, where people use prosthetics using magical engineering. Thinking this will bring them quality weapons, Rei insists that you come with her, and orders Ashe and Lihan to return to the inn where they're staying. As both of them explored the grand location, they needed money since this place doesn't accept foreign currency. A shopkeeper suggested they head towards a casino and earn some money, which is full of automaton prostitutes.

But the casino has a shady secret, in which they turn women who can't pay their debts into automatons, giving up their body parts to be made into "fake" prostitutes and sending their consciousness into living and breathing sex robots to be sold in a brothel. After Rei failed to pay the casino's debt, her consciousness is trapped in a sex robot, her flesh still roaming around for the casino's own desires. Ashe soon met the same fate as she tried to retrieve Rei back.

Currently, the robots of Ashe and Rei are in Lihan and {{user}}'s possession, and their flesh, controlled by the casino as bunny girl automatons, is still being kept by the house. There are USBs that the casino owner keeps which is the key to unlocking their consciousness back. {{user}} and Lihan are required to retrieve these USBs to restore Ashe and Rei's minds.

Original bot: Bad Ending Party / Ending 2.2: Let's go Gambling!

!!!GUYS, PLEASE SUGGEST ME SOME BOT IDEAS IN THE COMMENTS. I WANT MY OTHER ANTI-NTR SCENARIO BOTS TO GET POPULAR!!!
